case_title: BAY AREA CHRISTIAN CHARITIES VS ADELSON'S ANSWERING SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BAY AREA CHRISTIAN CHARITIES AS TO DEFENDANT ADELSON'S ANSWERING SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO BAY AREA CHRISTIAN CHARITIES RETURNED MOVED LEFT NO ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY AREA CHRISTIAN CHARITIES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ADELSON'S ANSWERING SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-26-1997, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO DEC-29-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ADELSON'S ANSWERING SERVICE
DECLARATION RE CHANGED OF ADDRESS OF PLAINTIFF.
DEFENDANT REQUEST CONTINUANCE SEE ATTACHED LETTERS WE SEND PAPERS TO JUDGE TO SIGN.
